textByHashes.914d8a69564573197b631ae6365226a1bb3f561d: Gnome Air is the finest airline in Gielinor!
textByHashes.87e27bfa2170d19354af5a1d5b9f8b8c79a03636: Well...it's the only real airline in Gielinor.
textByHashes.bc3a099725822c0ae5865e7a0076ddca5d4be036: Well there's a dodgy magic carpet operation in the desert, I doubt it will ever take off... Ha!
textByHashes.0757989559b01fb30c2c77756dc4ad248ddbdda8: Glough has ordered that I only take gnomes on Gnome Air.
textByHashes.d61c92b63ccccff60fe334fb5ae82c66b493b113: I would, but Glough has told me not to take humans on Gnome Air.
textByHashes.2ec2aae8e682d9c7f14f2605cac90b31019c5928: Oh, he's always up to something. Like that magic carpet business.
textByHashes.e3c4df6d960195641ff2fdcafc29f5f15f290aaa: He said he was planning to set up a magic carpet network, like our gliders.
textByHashes.50c1b7425d57ed8b3441ecfbf7ce4fd5b8ab06e9: If he ever gets it set up, us gnomes won't be happy with him. Especially not King Narnode!
textByHashes.2894fc67a0b16bb9c889fca4de0925552bc476f6: Oh we have a whole network! It's wonderful for getting to hard to reach places.
textByHashes.1b4be51dc9c4b6c853701b95e390090dafeea7e8: There are so many places where your teleports cannot reach!
textByHashes.1928d5e39b9cd3b5a191444e707e30c0183758a4: I think you'll find that is a gnome trade secret!
textByHashes.96edb7556a59326967de0b2188e312a860e5335a: Good show old chap, nothing like a reminder of home.
textByHashes.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
textByHashes.c58a2913c1c525281796f354f5d92bdc6af51fa9: You have come to the right place. At the center I must go, 5 paces toward the circle of stone, then one more to the city of kings and find the treasure of my kins.
